summary: Iteration 2 testing: bulk-add endpoint + PWA assets + Saved Squad + Recap card + My Matches + regression. Backend 8/8 tests passing. Frontend flows verified end-to-end including recap PNG download on both Admin and MVP voting pages.
critical_code_review_comments: MVPVoting recap buttons (share-recap-mvp/download-recap-mvp) only render when results.mvp exists (someone has voted). This is correct-by-design but note that testid presence is conditional — expected.

AdminPanel.jsx uses `votingClosedOrDone = mvp_voting_open || completed` for the recap panel. Spec mentioned played/mvp_voting_open/completed — 'played' status does NOT show recap panel currently; minor spec drift but not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed matches created via API tests; localStorage cleared between runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk-add tests already cover happy path, dupe-skip, max_players cap, bad token 403, invalid rating 422. Recap PNG download validated via Playwright expect_download on both Admin and MVP pages. My Matches dashboard flow tested empty→create→populated. Manifest, service-worker.js, icon-192/512, favicon.svg all HTTP 200.
verified_features: POST /api/matches/{id}/admin/{token}/bulk-add: added/skipped counters correct, respects max_players, dedupes on phone, 403 on bad token, 422 on bad rating
/my-matches empty state with empty-cta present; after creating a match, my-matches-list contains the match with open-admin-{id} link
CreateMatch load-squad-btn shows 'No saved squad yet' toast when empty
AdminPanel admin-save-squad + admin-load-squad buttons work; Load Squad calls bulk-add and populates roster
Manifest served with FairXI name, standalone display, correct icons; favicon.svg, icon-192.png, icon-512.png, service-worker.js all reachable (200)
Recap panel appears in Admin when match status is mvp_voting_open (teams generated + voting open); download-recap-btn triggers PNG blob download successfully with no JS errors
MVP Voting page: mvp-card + share-recap-mvp + download-recap-mvp present when MVP exists (demo); PNG download triggered successfully
Home page still loads demo (Ben MVP, $10 share)
Nav 'My Matches' link visible and navigates to /my-matches
